zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Rennelegh Adams於1455年出生在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，他的父親Thomas Adams33歲，母親Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh1歲。他於大約1510年與Lydia Chadwick在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1542年10月2日在英國斯塔福爾姆可萊斯同享年87歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾紐可亞斯特萊-德-萊。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Adriano, Aldo, Amadeo, Amedeo, Antonio, Armando, Cristiano, Donato, Emilio, Erasmo, Eugenio, Gerado, Marco, Salvatore, Saverio.
Italian: patronymic from the personal name Adamo, an equivalent of Adam .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Rennelegh Adams was born in 1455, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Adams, was 33 and his mother, Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh, was 1. He married Lydia Chadwick about 1510, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 2 October 1542, in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Newcastle-under-Lyme, Staffordshire, England.

Il a épousé Lydia Chadwick environ 1510, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1542, à Mucklestone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Newcastle-under-Lyme, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

Oktober 1542 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Mucklestone, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Newcastle-under-Lyme, Staffordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Rennelegh Adamsが1455年にイギリスソメルセトバートン スト ダヴィドで生まれた時，父Thomas Adamsは33歳，母Jane Elizabeth Ranneleghは1歳であった。約1510年にイギリスイギリスでLydia Chadwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1542年10月2日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアムックレストーンで87歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアニューカストレ-ウンデル-リメにて埋葬された。

ko.St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 스트. 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Rennelegh Adams(이)가 1455년 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Adams(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh(은)는 1세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lydia Chadwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1542년 10월 2일 영국 스태퍼드실르 무클레스톤에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 뉴카스틀레-운더-림에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Rennelegh Adams nasceu em 1455, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Adams, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh, tinha 1 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Chadwick aproximadamente 1510, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Englan: ст. джемесь, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Rennelegh Adams родился в 1455 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Adams было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Elizabeth Rannelegh, 1. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Chadwick около 1510 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 2 октября 1542 г. в местности мукклестоун, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности нюкастле-ундир-лим, стаффордшир, Англия.
